sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check full segmentation for all colors
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All nodes:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    b = node['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  {node['color']} id={node['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={node['pixels']}")

# Count all colors
from collections import Counter
colors = Counter(n['color'] for n in seg['nodes'])
print(f"\nColor counts: {dict(colors)}")

# Try pressing SPACE to see if level completes
result = action(['SPACE'])
print(f"\nAfter SPACE: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}, done={result.get('done')}")

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAll nodes after:")
for node in seg2['nodes']:
    b = node['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  {node['color']} id={node['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
